reasons: Atlas creates a grouped teamfight window where Valentina can safely follow with magic damage or a copied ultimate.
Valentina can use the setup after Atlas commits instead of being the first hero entering.

proof.summary: Atlas groups enemies with a teamfight engage, while Valentina follows with magic damage, copied-ultimate value, or control follow-up.
worksBestWhen: Atlas engages after Valentina is close enough to follow.
Valentina has a useful copied ultimate or key cooldowns ready.
The team is ready to fight around Atlas's pull.
failureCases: Atlas engages before Valentina can follow.
Valentina copies a low-value ultimate for the fight.
Enemy burst forces Valentina away before she can cast.

reasons: Mathilda helps Valentina reposition after entering with her dash or after committing to a copied-ultimate play.
Valentina benefits from Mathilda's shield and movement support because she often needs to step into risky mid-range casting windows.

proof.summary: Mathilda gives Valentina shield, movement speed, and reposition support, helping Valentina enter, follow up, or reset after casting.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda saves Guiding Wind for Valentina's real commit or escape.
Valentina uses the movement support to cast safely instead of overextending.
Mathilda stays close enough for Valentina to use the reposition window.
failureCases: Valentina enters before Mathilda can support.
Mathilda uses Guiding Wind on another teammate first.
Enemy hard crowd control locks Valentina before she can reset.

reasons: Kalea can knock up, grab, or reposition enemies, giving Valentina a controlled follow-up window.
Valentina can use Kalea's setup to land damage or prepare a copied ultimate with less risk.

proof.summary: Kalea creates a forced-position or airborne-control window, while Valentina follows with magic damage or copied-ultimate utility.
worksBestWhen: Kalea moves the target toward Valentina's safe casting range.
Valentina waits for Kalea's confirmed control before using key cooldowns.
The team follows the same displaced target.
failureCases: Kalea displaces the target away from Valentina.
Valentina spends cooldowns before Kalea confirms the setup.
Enemy peel interrupts Valentina after Kalea commits.

reasons: Carmilla's linked-target teamfight pattern increases Valentina's value when enemies are clustered.
Valentina can layer magic damage or a copied crowd-control ultimate into Carmilla's linked fight.

proof.summary: Carmilla links enemies in a teamfight, while Valentina adds magic damage or copied-ultimate utility into the linked window.
worksBestWhen: Carmilla links multiple enemies before Valentina commits.
Valentina saves her strongest follow-up for the linked window.
failureCases: Enemies spread and reduce the linked-target value.
Carmilla links after Valentina has already spent cooldowns.

reasons: Franco can hook or suppress one target, giving Valentina a safe pickoff follow-up window.
Valentina can use the confirmed target to cast magic damage, copy a useful ultimate, or help finish the target before the enemy resets.

proof.summary: Franco confirms one enemy with hook or suppression, while Valentina follows with magic damage or copied-ultimate setup.
worksBestWhen: Franco catches a high-value target near Valentina.
Valentina keeps key cooldowns ready for the confirmed pick.
Franco does not isolate a target outside Valentina's range.
failureCases: Valentina is too far away to follow.
